title: A round orange UFO observed by two people in Iguarapava-SP [2001]

text_preview:
JAN 7th, 2001. Time: 6:30 pm. Duration: 5 to 10 minutes. Under good visibility conditions, an unidentified flying object was sighted over the city of Iguarapava, State of São Paulo, by two witnesses. They reported a round orange UFO that was “bigger than an airplane” and it was approximately 20km from the observation point, going from North to Southwest.

Cf. ARQUIVO NACIONAL (Brasil). Sistema de Informações do Arquivo Nacional (SIAN). Fundo ‘Objeto Voador Não Identificado (OVNI)’. Código de Referência BR DFANBSB ARX.0.0.592. “Questionário sobre avistamento de ovni na cidade de Iguarapava, São
summary: On 7 Jan 2001, two witnesses in Iguarapava-SP observed a round orange UFO larger than an airplane traveling north to southwest for 5-10 minutes.
